allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import * as p from '@phosphor-icons/react'; const icons = ['Confetti','Sparkle','Egg','HandsClapping','Barbell','Hourglass','Smiley','Wrench','ArrowsClockwise','ThumbsUp','Eye','Rocket','Target','Lock','Check','Play','Heart','Brain','CheckCircle']; icons.forEach\(n => console.log\(n + ':', !!p[n]\)\);" 2>&1)
